stances.name: Bare Knuckle
lv25_bonus_extra: None

skills.name: Crescent Moon
skills.description: Swings a sword in a moon-shaped arc to bring enemies down.

skills.name: Grind Cutter
skills.description: Swings a sabre in a powerful whirling motion.

skills.name: Assassinate
skills.description: Confuses enemies with swift pierces before dealing a critical attack.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 4m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Plumbullet shot
skills.description: Fires a poisonous bullet.

skills.name: Double Firing
skills.description: Fire two rapid shots consecutively.

skills.name: Snap Shot
skills.description: Shoots 5 targets within a certain area.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 9m away and within a 3m radius

skills.name: Zero-In
skills.description: Fires rapidly at a single enemy.

skills.name: Pistol Shot
skills.description: Shoots 5 times consecutively with the pistol in the left hand. This can be used as a normal attack.

skills.name: Slash Down
skills.description: Delivers downward slashes.

skills.name: Deadly Infinitum
skills.description: Slashes enemies mercilessly before finishing him off with a shot.

skills.name: Grind Cutter
skills.description: Swings a sabre in a powerful whirling motion.

skills.name: Into The Hell
skills.description: Fires a series of pistol shots at an enemy and advance upon him with a blade.

stances.name: Cutlass

skills.name: Get Set
skills.description: Highly increases critical rate while using the skill, and gives 3 times damage with a fixed probability of Critical.

effects: Increase in damage by 200 + (extra [AGI] * 5)% by chance of 16% of Critical in skill use
Increase in damage by 200 + (extra [AGI] * 5)% by chance of 70% of Critical in skill use
Increase in damage by 200 + (extra [AGI] * 5)% by chance of 76% of Critical in skill use
Increase in damage by 200 + (extra [AGI] * 5)% by chance of 100% of Critical in skill use

skills.name: Crescent Firing
skills.description: To throw the sword with skill and shoots to explode the area, swings Sabre quickly.

skills.name: Dance with Cutlass
skills.description: Cross to use Sabre and gun to attack enemies.

skills.name: Drive Spear
skills.description: Pass through battle line of the enemy to attack indiscriminately and draw a circle to attack enemies.
skills.target: Up to 7 enemies 9m away and within 9m

skills.name: In to the Heaven
skills.description: Shoot an enemy within a range and rush to them attacking quickly.

skills.name: Angel Brake
skills.description: After shooting the enemies surrounding you, shakes the ground to knock them down.
skills.target: Up to 8 enemies within a range of 8m

skills.name: Sea of Angel
skills.description: After shooting an enemy continuously, cause a sword storm to knock it down.

skills.name: Into the Sanctuary
skills.description: After cutting the target continuously and shooting indiscriminately, defeat it with a final cut.

If the amount of targets exceeds [50% of the max. amount], damage increases by 150% ~ 300%

skills.name: Hexen Dropper
skills.description: Slashes mercilessly with a set of double swords.

skills.name: Dust Devil
skills.description: Kicks up a vicious dust storm that envelops enemies in the vicinity.
skills.target: Up to 5 Enemies within a range of 2.5m

skills.name: Cross Penetration
skills.description: Takes enemies down with powerful thrusts from a set of twin swords.

stances.name: Bloody Feast

skills.name: Crimson Crescent
skills.description: Jump briefly and fire two red beams towards a distant enemy. From Skill Lv.11 onwards, [Bloody Fiesta]s Lv. increases on use.

skills.name: Bloody Horizon
skills.description: Cross two sabres rapidly and make four consecutive attacks towards thesurrounding enemies. [Bloody Fiesta]s Lv. increases on use.

skills.name: Destination
skills.description: More blood makes you stronger. If Bloody Fiesta is active, buff level +1.

effects: [Bloody Fiesta] - Level does not increase while using the skill

skills.name: Vortex Slicer
skills.description: Uses two sabers to attack the enemy with dazzling, dance-like moves. [Bloody Fiesta]s Lv. increases on use.

skills.name: Phantastorm
skills.description: Runs along a reverse pentagram and destroys enemies along the way. Increases damage by 10% per level of Bloody Fiesta, then Bloody Fiesta ends.

effects: 60% chance to impose [Mortal Wound] on enemy
60% chance to impose [Mortal Wound] on enemy
